requirement_topic.en: Nigerian Standards (NIS) Safety Requirements — Heat Pumps and Air Conditioners (NIS/IEC 60335-2-40)
requirement_topic.zh: 尼日利亚标准（NIS）安全要求——热泵与空调器（NIS/IEC 60335-2-40）
requirement_topic.zht: 尼日利亞標準（NIS）安全要求——熱泵與空調器（NIS/IEC 60335-2-40）

summary.en: SON develops and publishes Nigerian Industrial Standards (NIS) that adopt IEC international standards. Heat pumps and air conditioners are required to comply with NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners, and dehumidifiers) as part of the MANCAP conformity assessment process. Safety compliance is assessed during SON product certification and pre-shipment inspection. Products with wireless or communication modules must also satisfy NCC (Nigerian Communications Commission) radio type approval and EMC requirements.
summary.zh: SON制定并发布采用IEC国际标准的尼日利亚工业标准（NIS）。热泵和空调器须在MANCAP符合性评定过程中符合NIS/IEC 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）。安全合规在SON产品认证和装运前检验阶段进行评定。带有无线或通信模块的产品还须满足NCC（尼日利亚通信委员会）无线型式认可和EMC要求。
summary.zht: SON制定並發布採用IEC國際標準的尼日利亞工業標準（NIS）。熱泵和空調器須在MANCAP符合性評定過程中符合NIS/IEC 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）。安全合規在SON產品認證和裝運前檢驗階段進行評定。帶有無線或通信模組的產品還須滿足NCC（尼日利亞通信委員會）無線型式認可和EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Heat pumps, air-conditioners, and dehumidifiers)
NIS/IEC 60335-1 (General requirements for safety of household and similar electrical appliances)
Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) radio type approval and EMC requirements

summary.en: Chinese heat pumps are safety-certified under CCC to GB 4706.32, which is the China adoption of IEC 60335-2-40. Because both NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 and GB 4706.32 derive from the same IEC base standard, test data and technical documentation generated for Chinese CCC may be used as supporting technical evidence during the SON MANCAP process. However, a separate SON conformity assessment and MANCAP certification is still mandatory — CCC does not substitute.
summary.zh: 中国热泵依据GB 4706.32（IEC 60335-2-40的中国采标）通过CCC安全认证。由于NIS/IEC 60335-2-40和GB 4706.32均源自同一IEC基础标准，为中国CCC生成的测试数据和技术文件可在SON MANCAP过程中作为辅助技术证据使用。但仍须单独完成SON符合性评定并取得MANCAP认证——CCC不可替代。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵依據GB 4706.32（IEC 60335-2-40的中國採標）透過CCC安全認證。由於NIS/IEC 60335-2-40和GB 4706.32均源自同一IEC基礎標準，為中國CCC生成的測試數據和技術文件可在SON MANCAP過程中作為輔助技術證據使用。但仍須單獨完成SON符合性評定並取得MANCAP認證——CCC不可替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners, and dehumidifiers — China adoption of IEC 60335-2-40)
GB 4706.1 (General requirements — China adoption of IEC 60335-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for domestic market, not recognised by SON

gap.en: Both NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 and GB 4706.32 are based on IEC 60335-2-40, reducing the underlying technical gap; CCC test reports to GB 4706.32 may be usable as supporting technical evidence in the SON MANCAP process. However, SON MANCAP certification is a separate mandatory Nigeria obligation. For units with Wi-Fi, BLE, or other wireless modules, NCC type approval is an additional requirement not covered by CCC.
gap.zh: NIS/IEC 60335-2-40与GB 4706.32均基于IEC 60335-2-40，底层技术差距较小；GB 4706.32的CCC测试报告可能在SON MANCAP过程中作为辅助技术证据使用。但SON MANCAP认证是独立的尼日利亚强制义务。对于带Wi-Fi、BLE或其他无线模块的设备，NCC型式认可是CCC未涵盖的额外要求。
gap.zht: NIS/IEC 60335-2-40與GB 4706.32均基於IEC 60335-2-40，底層技術差距較小；GB 4706.32的CCC測試報告可能在SON MANCAP過程中作為輔助技術證據使用。但SON MANCAP認證是獨立的尼日利亞強制義務。對於帶Wi-Fi、BLE或其他無線模組的設備，NCC型式認可是CCC未涵蓋的額外要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 compliance assessed as part of SON MANCAP; NCC type approval mandatory for wireless-enabled units
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 4706.32 under CCC); IEC-aligned but not recognised as equivalent by SON

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moderate gap — NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 and GB 4706.32 share the same IEC base, so Chinese CCC test evidence may support the SON MANCAP process; however, SON MANCAP certification is a separate mandatory Nigeria requirement and CCC cannot substitute. Wireless-enabled units require additional NCC type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中度差距——NIS/IEC 60335-2-40与GB 4706.32基于相同IEC基础标准，中国CCC测试证据可辅助SON流程；但SON MANCAP认证是独立的尼日利亚强制要求，CCC不可替代。带无线功能设备须额外取得NCC型式认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中度差距——NIS/IEC 60335-2-40與GB 4706.32基於相同IEC基礎標準，中國CCC測試證據可輔助SON流程；但SON MANCAP認證是獨立的尼日利亞強制要求，CCC不可替代。帶無線功能設備須額外取得NCC型式認可。
